case_title: CONRAD HOUSE,INCORPORATED VS. JOSSEPH BURNS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE,INCORPORATED
